/tracks.title: Tracks — GB Media
/tracks.description: A dedicated archive of songs published and shaped by GB Media, including track credits and backstories.
h1: THE SONGS WE PUSHED INTO THE WORLD
h2: YOUR TRACK COULD BE NEXT IN THE ARCHIVE
p: A dedicated archive of records published, polished, and shaped by GB Media — each with the spark that started it and the story behind the final sound.

Built around a money-talk hook and a low-lit bounce, this record started as a gritty demo and became a sharper flex anthem after GB Media rebuilt the drums, tightened the pocket, and made the vocal feel closer to the listener.
The archive below keeps every published record in one place, with the credit details and the creative decision that gave each song its final shape.
Every song currently published through GB Media, with production credits and the story behind the sound.
One of the first songs made by Kal Nova that was published to platforms, and one of the first songs published by GB Media. Because of this, we have a special place in our hearts for it.

Drift started as a draft from November 12, 2025, until a meeting with GB Media where, when looking for drafts of songs to finish and publish, we found it. After listening to it, Kal Nova enjoyed the song, even though there were only about 4 bars done, enough to want to finish it. The chorus is the only part currently that contains the old vocals, and this is why during Gamer Ben's modification to the chorus, it still has some of Kal Nova's vocals.

This one began as a late-night atmosphere: glassy synths, heavy space, and a voice almost swallowed by reverb. GB Media turned that mood into a cinematic track with detail in the echoes and weight in the master.

Pressure was written to feel restless. The beat was pushed toward a darker street pulse, then mixed with clipped energy and red-light tension so the track keeps moving even when the vocal gets cold and minimal.

AYA V wanted polish without losing the ache. GB Media tuned the vocal transparently, widened the shimmer around the chorus, and mastered the final record so the glossy surface still carries the hurt underneath.

No Signal came from distortion, isolation, and a hook that felt like it was breaking through static. GB Media leaned into the glitch, cleaned the low end, and made the final track hit like a transmission finally locking in.
Bring the demo, the hook, or the unfinished idea. GB Media can help shape the final record, publish it cleanly, and give it a story worth remembering.
Your ideas deserve more than a demo. Let's put them into the world for all to hear.

p: Let’s get in touch! Whether you’re ready to start a project, have a question, or just want to connect, drop me a message below and I’ll get back to you soon.

/.title: GB Media - Music Publishing
/.description: Publishing Music for Independant Artists, so you can keep doing what you love!
h3: TURNED MY IDEA INTO A HIT!
What do I get with delivery?
How long does a project take?
What genres do you work in?
p: Your music deserves publicity worldwide. We handle the distribution, and you just do what you love.
From sketch to full arrangement — I create original beats, compose melodies, and build complete productions that fit your unique sound. Every track is crafted to match your style and artistic vision.

I carefully blend vocals, instruments, and effects to achieve clarity, balance, and depth. The goal is a professional, radio-ready mix where every element has its space and the energy of the song comes through.
The final step that makes your music shine across all platforms. I give your tracks loudness, consistency, and polish so they sound powerful on Spotify, in clubs, and on the radio.
The final step to getting your music heard. We fully manage the process of distribution for you!
From underground talents to established names, I’ve shaped tracks that connect with listeners on a deeper level, bringing each artist’s vision to life.
Every record begins with a clear vision. I shape raw ideas into music that feels intentional, timeless, and emotionally powerful.
Details matter. From sound design to final polish, I approach every track with precision and care that makes the music shine.
Collaboration only works with trust. I keep communication open, deadlines tight, and always deliver what I promise without compromise.
Music should move people. I focus on creating productions that carry energy—tracks that connect instantly and stay with listeners.
Darius transformed my rough demo into a track that sounds radio-ready. His attention to detail made all the difference.
Working with Darius was smooth from start to finish. Clear communication, fast delivery, and a track that exceeded my expectations.
The mastering gave my track the punch it was missing. It now sounds amazing on Spotify and in the club.
Your ideas deserve more than a demo. Let's put them into the world for all to hear.
